<h1> bytemancy 1 </h1>


---


## Start:

<img width="1349" height="523" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6d22290a-0b3a-4a22-8e9d-e97047ea48a2" />


<img width="672" height="591" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0fbb22de-8e23-48d6-ad9a-09c4c77e6172" />


<img width="546" height="160" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/21e4988f-3ca4-4f18-afff-3b62cb1a34b5" />

Now I was installed it, then go to it:
````
cd Desktop
mkdir Pico-CTF
ls
cd Pico-CTF
````
<img width="455" height="340" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fb2dff2c-131f-4d61-9f03-4cfdec08e65a" />


After move from `Download` foler to our Pico-CTF folder:
````
cd Downloads
ls
mv app.py /home/k4n0ng/Desktop/Pico-CTF
````
<img width="755" height="280" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/169cd99e-c2eb-401f-ad05-2e1af4cddb1f" />


After back to or Pico-CTF folder:
````
ls
````
<img width="421" height="158" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/845a91a2-6df9-4ab3-baa4-52c2c9998229" />


````
cat app.py
````
<img width="792" height="478" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/daad2b8d-0560-417e-9d73-913028e1f187" />


The condition is:
````
if user_input == "\x65"*1751:
````
- ``\x65`` is hexadecimal for **ASCII decimal** ``101``.

- ASCII decimal 101 = character ``e``.


So the program wants:
````
"e" * 1751
````
Meaning:
- the letter ``e``
- repeated 1751 times
- no spaces


````
python3 -c 'print("e"*1751)'
````
<img width="1902" height="278" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/07f25468-ea2c-4cd3-97d1-ae5e6b4a910d" />


| Part      | Meaning                 |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `\x65`    | Hexadecimal ASCII value |
| ASCII 101 | Character `e`           |
| `*1751`   | Repeat 1751 times       |



### Login to SSH:
````
nc foggy-cliff.picoctf.net 63733
````
After input this:
````

````
<img width="1908" height="422" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/249a1d78-28d8-4719-ba19-7fd04fbec16a" />

Now we see flag.



## Flag:
````
picoCTF{h0w_m4ny_e's???_f569ad6f}
````
<img width="1334" height="546" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bb8a4ebe-b749-487b-ada4-66ed91f90cb7" />
